sttrjv1.1

Object Oriented Programming — Assignment 1, Semester 2, 2025

Skip navigation links
  • Overview

SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
CourseValidator
Overwrites Validator isValid to validate an input for course (direction).
Dimensions
Represents the concept of well, having 2d dimensions like width and height.
EnergyValidator
Overwrites Validator isValid to validate an input for an energy value.
Enterprise
Representation of the Enterprise, handles internal state for the Enterprise in our game.
Entity
Entity is used to represent a physical object or 'thing' in the Game.
Galaxy
Handles the Quadrants held within the Galaxy.
Game
The main Game class responsible for holding all relevant classes for the game coordinating player and enemy actions.
InputHandler
Responsible for handling user input, uses a given Validator to validate user input, and a given String for the user prompt to print.
Klingon
Klingon handles Entity behaviour plus some extra behaviour.
Line
Represents a line of text.
Main
 
Quadrant
Quadrant are sections of space with a randomised mixture of Stars, Klingons and Starbases.
Renderer
Responsible for outputting Section and their Line to the screen.
Section
A section represents a chunk of the screen with a set width and height.
Star
Star is a relatively inert Entity in a Quadrant.
Starbase
A Starbase is an Entity that can protect and heal the Enterprise.
Stat
A Statistic object - a managed integer with an enforced minimum and maximum value.
Validator
Validator passed to InputHandler for use in validating the users input.
View
This class is responsible for handling printing stuff out to the screen.
WarpCoordValidator
Overwrites Validator isValid to validate an input for warp coordinates.
XyPair
Represents a data object with an x and y integer, used for things like position and vectors.
